query:
-- Check if there are any remaining 4G-type services still at $0 cost that we missed
SELECT serviceId, planName, supplierName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerName
FROM services
WHERE (
  planName LIKE '%4G%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Failover SIM%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Backup SIM%'
)
AND monthlyCost = 0.00
AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%DEFAULT COST APPLIED%')
AND status != 'terminated'
LIMIT 20;

-- Check if there are any remaining 4G-type services still at $0 cost that we missed
SELECT serviceId, planName, supplierName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerName
FROM services
WHERE (
  planName LIKE '%4G%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Failover SIM%'
  OR planName LIKE '%Backup SIM%'
)
AND monthlyCost = 0.00
AND (discoveryNotes IS NULL OR discoveryNotes NOT LIKE '%DEFAULT COST APPLIED%')
AND status != 'terminated'
LIMIT 20;
